name: Application Settings & Constants
description: Central configuration constants, per-session settings persistence, and model configuration. Acts as the single source of truth for magic numbers, model IDs, and timeouts.

Constants/FeatureConstants.cs.content:
class FeatureConstants
  L15: SpritelyDir: string = ".spritely"
  L18: FeaturesDir: string = "features"
  L21: IndexFileName: string = "_index.json"
  L24: CodebaseIndexFileName: string = "_codebase_index.json"
  L27: ModuleIndexFileName: string = "_module_index.json"
  L30: ModuleFileExtension: string = ".module.json"
  L33: PendingUpdatesFileName: string = "_pending_updates.json"
  L38: MaxFeaturesPerTask: int = 8
  L41: MaxSecondaryFeaturesPerTask: int = 5
  L44: MaxTokensPerSecondaryFeature: int = 150
  L47: MaxTokensPerFeature: int = 500
  L50: MaxTotalFeatureContextTokens: int = 3000
  L55: SignatureHashLength: int = 12
  L58: MaxFilesPerSonnetChunk: int = 400
  L61: MaxFilesPerChunk: int = MaxFilesPerSonnetChunk
  L64: MaxSignatureLinesPerFile: int = 30
  L69: MaxModulesPerProject: int = 20
  L72: MaxFeaturesPerModule: int = 30
  L77: SymbolMatchScoreBoost: double = 0.4
  L83: FastPathConfidenceThreshold: double = 0.85
  L86: FastPathMaxCandidates: int = 3
  L91: PlaceholderExpiryDays: int = 7
  L96: MutexTimeoutMs: int = 5000
  L99: MutexRetryCount: int = 3

patterns: Static constants class for compile-time values
